facebook.caption: If scuba diving is on your Phu Quoc bucket list, Poseidon Diving School Phu Quoc Padi is the place to start. Holding a perfect 5-star rating across 178 reviews, this PADI-certified school welcomes complete beginners and experienced divers alike. The waters around Phu Quoc are clearest between November and April, making that the ideal window to explore the reefs. Practical tip: book your course a day or two in advance, especially during peak season, to lock in your preferred time slot.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the bubbles rise as students take their first breaths underwater at Poseidon Diving School Phu Quoc Padi. A perfect 5-star rating from 178 divers says it all. PADI-certified, beginner-friendly, and set against some of the most colourful reefs in southern Vietnam. Your underwater adventure starts here.

instagram.caption: Zero dive experience? No problem. Poseidon Diving School Phu Quoc Padi is PADI-certified, beginner-friendly, and sitting on a flawless 5-star rating from 178 happy divers. Book ahead in peak season and get ready to see Phu Quoc from below the surface.
instagram.video_caption: First breath underwater hits different when the reef looks like this. Poseidon Diving School Phu Quoc Padi, rated 5 stars by 178 divers. PADI-certified and ready for you.
